positive: A vibrant, stylized geometric animal silhouette, specifically a leaping fox or canine, surrounded by repeating, abstract mandala patterns. The design should use a limited color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and cream, creating a strong visual contrast. The composition must be perfectly centered and designed to wrap around a curved surface, emphasizing clean lines and scalable repetition. Vector art style, flat graphic design, mid-century modern illustration influence, high contrast, stencil cutout aesthetic, clean white background, suitable for textile printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grain, sloppy, noisy, smudges
